name: Crushing Blow
description: Melee swing in front of player. 110% weapon damage. Knockback small enemies.

name: Seismic Slam
description: Ground slam. Shockwave travels forward 3 tiles. 150% weapon damage in line.

name: Iron Fortress
description: 2-second shield absorbing up to [Armour × 3] damage. Cannot attack while active.

name: Berserker's Charge
description: Dash 4 tiles toward cursor. Hit all enemies in path for 180% damage. Brief stun.

name: Whirlwind
description: Spin continuously dealing 80% damage/hit to all nearby enemies. Drains 15 Rage/sec.

name: Quickshot
description: Fire an arrow toward cursor. 100% weapon damage. Long range.

name: Multishot
description: Fire 5 arrows in a 30° arc simultaneously. 80% damage each.

name: Explosive Arrow
description: Fires an arrow that embeds and detonates after 0.5 sec. 200% AoE damage in 2-tile radius.

name: Vaulting Escape
description: Backflip 3 tiles away from cursor. Brief invulnerability (0.3 sec) during leap.

name: Rain of Arrows
description: Mark a 4x4 tile area. After 1 sec, 12 arrows rain down over 2 seconds. 120% each.
